name: Spiced Beef Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables, drained (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a skillet; brown beef.
2. Add flour and mix well.
3. Add onions, garlic, spices, sugar, beer or water, and broth.
4. Place casserole dish in oven preheated to 350°F. Cook until meat is tender, about 1-1/2 hours, adding VEG-ALL vegetables 15 minutes before completion.
5. Remove whole bay leaf and serve.
